description: Mexican criminal organization specializing in drug trafficking, illegal mining, and extortion. Formed in 2011 as a splinter group after the original La Familia Michoacana lost power. Led by brothers Johnny and José Alfredo Hurtado Olascoaga. Operates primarily in Michoacán, Guerrero, and the State of Mexico, and is involved in distributing cocaine, fentanyl, and methamphetamine to the United States. Designated as a foreign terrorist organization by the U.S. State Department in 2025.

country_links.evidence_quote: la organización está involucrada principalmente en la distribución de cocaína , fentanilo y metanfetamina hacia los Estados Unidos
country_links.context: The organization distributes cocaine, fentanyl, and methamphetamine into the United States.
